holdings.infoBox: JHEM is an equity ETF with a total of 983 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 6.78%, Samsung Electronics at 5.91%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.30%, MediaTek at 2.46%, and Tencent Holdings at 2.21%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Multifactor Emerging Markets ETF (JHEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor weighted index of large- and mid-cap stocks from emerging markets. JHEM was launched on Sep 27, 2018 and is issued by John Hancock.
